headline: INVH Stock Up 11.4% in Three Months: Will the Momentum Last?
summary: Invitation Homes outpaces its industry as leasing trends, asset-light growth and tech-driven income gains support momentum, even as supply risks weigh.

summary: US stocks extend an 8-week rally as earnings offset rate volatility; REITs surge on sector strength and major mergers. Read the full analysis here.
